description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a manicured lawn, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a covered outdoor seating area, all surrounded by fencing and greenery for privacy. The structure is primarily composed of white and beige materials, with accents of wood and glass, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the modern aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living and seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. The design is sleek, with white and beige tones, wood accents, and an emphasis on open, airy spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, manicured lawn, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the garage, and the transition to the backyard with the pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, wooden deck, covered seating area, and privacy fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, windows, and the connection between the front and backyard spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
